title: Mailing Bags, Grey Parcel Delivery Bags with Self-Seal Closure, Flexible Lightweight and Tear Proof Postal Mailing Bags, Multipack Mailing Envelope Bags (09x12, 25pk)
features: TEAR-PROOF MAILING BAGS: Perfect for sending multiple items, the postal bags are made from durable material. Tear-proof and resistant to water. Anything you send by mail with these bags will be safe from dust, moisture, or temper.

SELF-SEAL CLOSURE: The sealing lip permanently close and conceal the bag with strong adhesive glue. Put the content in the bag, peel the strap and seal carefully. Once it is closed, it is tough to open again, ensuring total privacy of the items sent.

SAFE AND SECURE: Safely and securely mail your items. The high-quality material of the mailing bags is 100% opaque to ensure confidentiality and privacy. The adhesive glue on the sealing lip provides the delivery bags with no risk of opening or tampering.

MAILING SOLUTION: Designed to be lightweight and flexible, these mailing bags are the ideal mailing solutions for a wide variety of business or private use. The postal bags have a great capacity to bear the weight of books, magazines, documents, clothes, shoes or other office and stationery items.

SPECIFICATIONS: These packaging bags are available in a wide range of sizes, from small to large: 6x9inch (152 x 229 mm approx.), 9x12inch (229 x 305 mm approx.), 10x14inch (254 x 356 mm approx.), 12x16inch (305 x 406 mm approx.) For your convenience, we provide them in different multi quantity 25, 50, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000.
